case_title: MICHAEL SHEPHERD VS. GUO WEI ZHU

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-02-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU, GUO WEI

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SHEPHERD. DEFENDANT GUO WEI ZHU IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPERTER, WINNIE CHAN. MATTER DISMISSED AT 10:15 AM FOR NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEPHERD, MICHAEL
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-20-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SHEPERD IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT GUO WEI ZHU PRESENT VIA UNARTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER CONNIE CHEN. DEFENDANT WAS UNABLE TO ENABLE HIS AUDIO FEED TO ANSWER, AND THE COURT WAS UNABLE TO CONFIRM IF THE DEFENDANT COULD HEAR THE INTERPRETER. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG ALLOWS THE DEFENDANT A ONE TIME CONTINUANCE TO TIMELY SUBMIT THE VIDEO/TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE PACKET IF HE IS TO APPEAR BY ZOOM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEPHERD, MICHAEL
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT: UNARTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,658.77 FILED BY SHEPHERD, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU, GUO WEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
